cookie_this_cookie_policy_explains_ho_83: This Cookie Policy explains how ReplyVera uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website. It explains what these technologies are and why we use them, as well as your rights to control our use of them.
cookie_cookies_are_small_data_files_t_5f: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners in order to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.
cookie_we_use_first_party_and_third_p_d0: We use first-party and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our Website to operate, and we refer to these as "essential" or "strictly necessary" cookies. Other cookies also enable us to track and target the interests of our users to enhance the experience on our Website.
cookie_these_cookies_are_strictly_nec_fc: These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our Website and to use some of its features, such as access to secure areas.
cookie_these_cookies_collect_informat_bf: These cookies collect information that is used either in aggregate form to help us understand how our Website is being used or how effective our marketing campaigns are.
cookie_these_help_us_remember_your_lo_26: These help us remember your login session so you don't have to re-authenticate every time you move between the Dashboard and the site.
cookie_you_have_the_right_to_decide_w_24: You have the right to decide whether to accept or refuse cookies. You can set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies. If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our website though your access to some functionality and areas of our website may be restricted.
cookie_we_may_update_this_cookie_poli_43: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time in order to reflect, for example, changes to the cookies we use or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.

privacy_at_replyvera_we_value_your_pri_1: At ReplyVera, we value your privacy and the trust you place in us to manage your online reputation. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our service.
privacy_we_collect_information_to_prov_7: We collect information to provide a better service to all our users. This includes:
privacy_when_you_sign_up_we_collect_yo_f: When you sign up, we collect your email address and basic profile information via Google OAuth.
privacy_to_operate_our_core_service_we_5: To operate our core service, we request access to your Google Business Profile. This includes review content, reviewer names, and location data.

privacy_to_draft_and_post_replies_to_y_4: To draft and post replies to your Google reviews using AI.

privacy_to_communicate_with_you_about_39: To communicate with you about your account and service updates.
privacy_to_improve_our_ai_algorithms_f_9: To improve our AI algorithms for more accurate and helpful responses.
privacy_3_limited_use_for_google_user_87: 3. Limited Use for Google User Data
privacy_replyvera_s_use_and_transfer_t_d: ReplyVera's use and transfer to any other app of information received from Google APIs will adhere to the
privacy_google_api_services_user_data_04: Google API Services User Data Policy
privacy_we_do_not_use_your_google_data_e: We do not use your Google data for serving advertisements, and we do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy_we_retain_your_information_as_15: We retain your information as long as your account is active. If you disconnect your Google Account or delete your ReplyVera account, we will remove your tokens and cease data collection immediately.
privacy_we_implement_industry_standard_5: We implement industry-standard security measures, including encryption at rest and in transit, to protect your data from unauthorized access or disclosure.

terms_by_using_the_replyvera_service_920: By using the ReplyVera service ("Service"), you agree to the following terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms_replyvera_provides_an_ai_assis_ede: ReplyVera provides an AI-assisted review management platform designed to help businesses draft and manage replies to Google Business Profile reviews. The Service includes automated drafting and, where enabled, automated posting of replies.
terms_you_are_responsible_for_the_co_4ca: You are responsible for the content posted to your Google Business Profile. While ReplyVera uses advanced AI to draft responses, you acknowledge that:
terms_automated_replies_are_generate_f69: Automated replies are generated based on AI models and may not always be perfect.
terms_you_have_the_option_to_review_6c83: You have the option to review all drafts before they go live.
terms_you_must_comply_with_google_s_3c63: You must comply with Google's Business Profile policies at all times.
terms_by_connecting_your_google_acco_f17: By connecting your Google Account, you grant ReplyVera permission to access your Google Business Profile, read reviews, and post replies on your behalf. You can revoke this access at any time via your Google Account settings or our Dashboard.
terms_replyvera_is_a_subscription_ba_222: ReplyVera is a subscription-based service. You agree to pay all fees associated with your chosen plan. All payments are processed via our secure third-party provider (Stripe). You may cancel your subscription at any time.
terms_replyvera_is_provided_as_is_we_f9d: ReplyVera is provided "as is." We are not liable for any damages, loss of reputation, or Google account suspensions resulting from the use of the Service or the content of the AI-generated replies.
terms_we_reserve_the_right_to_suspen_c7f: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, use the service for spam, or engage in deceptive practices regarding customer reviews.
terms_we_may_update_these_terms_from_a2f: We may update these Terms from time to time. Your continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms_if_you_have_any_questions_abou_d73: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at
